interactive_push_tty: live per-scanner and per-file progress during wolf push
compact blocker and warning summaries for operator review

scanners.name: secret-scanner
scanners.purpose: credential, token, key, and embedded secret detection

scanners.name: basic-sast
scanners.purpose: high-signal appsec heuristics for obviously dangerous execution or parsing paths

scanners.name: artifact-scanner
scanners.purpose: opaque archive, binary, and suspicious generated bundle inspection

scanners.name: dependency-scanner
scanners.purpose: manifest, lockfile, provenance, and live advisory checks

scanners.name: config-scanner
scanners.purpose: CI, Docker, Kubernetes, infrastructure exposure, and release-attestation posture checks

scanners.name: policy-scanner
scanners.purpose: Wolfence local policy, trust, override authority, and hook-integrity checks

known_gaps: more cloud and SaaS token families
structured secret parsing beyond line heuristics
decoded or transformed secret representations

current_coverage: Cargo, npm, pnpm, Yarn, Go modules, Bundler, Poetry, uv, Pipenv, and pinned Python requirements
dependency-confusion posture for custom registries and unqualified package names
repo-local Node and Python internal package exact-name and prefix allowlists in .wolfence/config.toml

owner-host mismatch detection from node_registry_ownership, ruby_source_ownership, and python_index_ownership across tracked config, changed lockfiles (package-lock.json, npm-shrinkwrap.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock, Gemfile.lock, gems.locked, poetry.lock, uv.lock, Pipfile.lock), and explicit direct-source manifest entries in package.json, Gemfile, gems.rb, pyproject.toml, Pipfile, and requirements*.txt

direct-source bypass detection when declared internal packages use Git, archive, file, path, or editable-style sources instead of normal registry or index flow, including in uv.lock, poetry.lock, and Pipfile.lock
OSV exact-version querying on supported files
known_gaps: broader ecosystems
full structural parsing for every supported format
transitive graph resolution
per-package registry semantics beyond current host-and-pattern policy
maintainer or reputation signals

current_coverage: GitHub Release, Goreleaser, and semantic-release action publication detection
OCI publish provenance checks for docker/build-push-action
Kubernetes RBAC wildcard and cluster-admin binding checks
Kubernetes pod-hardening checks for privileged mode, privilege escalation, host namespaces, hostPath, and root posture
Terraform and OpenTofu remote-state encryption-disablement detection
Terraform and OpenTofu insecure HTTP backend detection
Terraform and OpenTofu secret-bearing output sensitivity-disablement detection
Terraform and OpenTofu secret-bearing variable sensitivity-disablement detection
Terraform and OpenTofu inline literal secret-attribute detection
Terraform and OpenTofu wildcard IAM trust and permission checks

Terraform and OpenTofu public all-ports ingress checks

deeper Terraform and OpenTofu structural parsing
cloud IAM and storage misconfiguration checks beyond current line-level signals
broader ecosystem-specific trusted-publishing and release-signing posture checks

current_coverage: string-built SQL query detection with untrusted input
insecure secret and token randomness detection
unsafe crypto primitive and mode detection
known_gaps: broader language-aware taint tracking

current_coverage: uncovered governance-sensitive paths such as workflows and .wolfence/*
semantic checks for repo-admin settings and rulesets including required signed-commit, linear-history, conversation-resolution, and status-check governance
known_gaps: live branch protection posture beyond current doctor checks
broader hook tamper detection beyond current launcher, path, external-symlink, and helper-indirection signals
broader release signing and provenance validation
deeper ownership semantics than current local CODEOWNERS matching

current_coverage: artifact download plus execute detection in GitHub Actions
new executable text launcher provenance detection
known_gaps: deeper archive contents inspection beyond current zip-like entry-name checks

current_coverage: scanner-bundle changes without local rule-provenance updates
native pre-push transport validation against the evaluated current-branch snapshot
push-snapshot revalidation elsewhere in the product
known_gaps: broader unmanaged hook replacement detection beyond current alternate-path, external-symlink, helper-indirection, and additional-hook checks
signed or external rule-distribution provenance beyond current repo-local inventory coupling
broader time-of-check to time-of-push coverage beyond the current native branch-push guard and wolf push snapshot revalidation

config: Kubernetes YAML or JSON content that defines Secrets, RBAC resources, bindings, or pod runtime security fields
